revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan complete/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan complete/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan complete/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan complete/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Japan location map templates]] to [[:Category:Japan location map modules]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
